runTitle: Local QA - AI Sidebar visual verification blocked by dev server timeout
coveredSurfaces: analysis basis process/debug split regression check
notes: 2026-04-19 KST local visual verification attempted after AnalysisBasisBadge/sidebar overflow fix.
`npm run dev` failed immediately on Turbopack with: Symlink node_modules is invalid, it points out of the filesystem root.
`npx next dev --webpack -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000` reached Ready state, but `curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3000/dashboard` timed out after 20s with 0 bytes received.
Playwright browser navigation to /dashboard timed out repeatedly (60s default, 180s direct goto) before DOMContentLoaded, so browser-level visual confirmation could not be completed.
Code/test-level verification for the UI change passed separately in this turn.
